references.hebrew: יָב֣וֹא שָׁל֔וֹם יָנ֖וּחוּ עַל־מִשְׁכְּבוֹתָ֑ם הֹלֵ֖ךְ נְכֹחֽוֹ׃ {ס}
references.english:
Yet one who walked straightforward
Shall come to peace,
Shall have rest on their couch.aShall have rest on their couch Heb. “they…shall have rest on their couches.” Here, “couch” is a euphemism for the grave; cf. 2 Chron. 16.14.

commentary_links.hebrew: אֵ֣ין שָׁל֔וֹם אָמַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה לָרְשָׁעִֽים׃ {פ}
commentary_links.english: There is no safety—said GOD—for the wicked.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לקראתו אחת אומרת אין שלום אמר ה

commentary_links.hebrew: הֵ֧ן כֻּלְּכֶ֛ם קֹ֥דְחֵי אֵ֖שׁ מְאַזְּרֵ֣י זִיק֑וֹת לְכ֣וּ ׀ בְּא֣וּר אֶשְׁכֶ֗ם וּבְזִיקוֹת֙ בִּֽעַרְתֶּ֔ם מִיָּדִי֙ הָיְתָה־זֹּ֣את לָכֶ֔ם לְמַעֲצֵבָ֖ה תִּשְׁכָּבֽוּן׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english:
But you are all kindlers of fire,
Girding onhGirding on Emendation yields “Lighters of.” firebrands.
Walk by the blaze of your fire,
By the brands that you have lit!
This has come to you from My hand:
You shall lie down in pain.iYou shall lie down in pain Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לרשעים ואחת אומרת לו למעצבה ישכב

commentary_links.english: Whom do you surpass in beauty? Down with you, and be laid to rest with the uncircumcised!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ואחת אומרת לו רדה והשכבה את ערלים &star מתני כל זמן שהיא בבית

commentary_links.hebrew: יָב֣וֹא שָׁל֔וֹם יָנ֖וּחוּ עַל־מִשְׁכְּבוֹתָ֑ם הֹלֵ֖ךְ נְכֹחֽוֹ׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english:
Yet one who walked straightforward
Shall come to peace,
Shall have rest on their couch.aShall have rest on their couch Heb. “they…shall have rest on their couches.” Here, “couch” is a euphemism for the grave; cf. 2 Chron. 16.14.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ואחת אומרת לו יבא שלום ינוחו על
